html:
Exclusive to:

ActiveInactiveBroken

“Flashy transportation. Keep your gaze on the floor if you feel dizzy or disoriented.”

-

The Sanctum Waymark can be found inside the Sanctum. It is used to teleport to other parts of the Sanctum Maze. When there are more than 1 player in the Sanctum, everyone has to touch the Waymark before moving to the next room together.

The Sanctum Waymark from the lobby is activated by the Archive Switch, which is located inside the Ancient Archive.

After the Sanctum reset, any repaired Sanctum Waymarks become broken again.

Beneath the Sanctum Waymark there are marks that hint where a Waymark leads to:

  • North
  • East
  • South
  • West

Portation Orb

“A focus of intent for the Sanctum Waymark, drawing together those beyond.”

-

The Portation Orb can be found near the Broken Sanctum Waymark. Players can use it to repair the Broken Sanctum Waymark or craft Portation Orb Fragments.

Usage

×3

Gallery

  • The pattern under the Waymark hints where it points to.
  • Sanctum Teleport Concept from Rhymes with Play stream.
  • On Sanctum Concept from Rhymes with Play stream.
  • Sanctum Waymark Concept from Rhymes with Play stream.
  • Sanctum Waymark Effect Concept from Rhymes with Play stream.
  • Under construction

Trivia

  • The Sanctum Waymark was introduced in the Ancient Echoes update.
StructuresResources
plainText:
Sanctum Waymark
Active
Inactive
Broken
Source
Sanctum
Miscellaneous
"vault_teleporter"
"vault_teleporter_broken"
Exclusive to:
ActiveInactiveBroken
“This piece really moves me.”
–Wilson
“It better work!”
–Willow
“Will be same Wolfgang on other side?”
–Wolfgang
“I wonder what happens to us in-between.”
–Wendy
“PARTICLE DISPLACEMENT DEVICE”
–WX-78
“It operates through particle transfer principles.”
–Wickerbottom
“This might feel a little funny, Luce.”
–Woodie
“I suppose it's a type of magic.”
–Maxwell
“Aye! At times, söme witchcraft is the önly cöurse.”
–Wigfrid
“We like this game.”
–Webber
“Instant people delivery!”
–Warly
“Make poof!”
–Wormwood
“That's magic for ya.”
–Winona
“How lame, I do the same.”
–Wortox
“Me go first!”
–Wurt
“Don't worry, Woby! I'll see you on the other side.”
–Walter
“A shame it's not portable.”
–Wanda
“It needs power.”
–Wilson, when examining a Sanctum Waymark while the Ancient Archive is not powered
“Someone forgot to plug it in.”
–Willow, when examining a Sanctum Waymark while the Ancient Archive is not powered
“It lacks power!”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Sanctum Waymark while the Ancient Archive is not powered
“There's no power.”
–Wendy, when examining a Sanctum Waymark while the Ancient Archive is not powered
“IT NEEDS POWER!!!”
–WX-78, when examining a Sanctum Waymark while the Ancient Archive is not powered
“As it is unpowered, this mechanism cannot operate.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Sanctum Waymark while the Ancient Archive is not powered
“I don't think it's turned on.”
–Woodie, when examining a Sanctum Waymark while the Ancient Archive is not powered
“Figures.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Sanctum Waymark while the Ancient Archive is not powered
“This infernal cöntraptiön hath nö spark!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Sanctum Waymark while the Ancient Archive is not powered
“Why won't it turn on?”
–Webber, when examining a Sanctum Waymark while the Ancient Archive is not powered
“There is no juice.”
–Warly, when examining a Sanctum Waymark while the Ancient Archive is not powered
“No spark”
–Wormwood, when examining a Sanctum Waymark while the Ancient Archive is not powered
“Where's the dang ON switch?”
–Winona, when examining a Sanctum Waymark while the Ancient Archive is not powered
“No power? At this hour?”
–Wortox, when examining a Sanctum Waymark while the Ancient Archive is not powered
“Grrr... why not?”
–Wurt, when examining a Sanctum Waymark while the Ancient Archive is not powered
“I don't think there's power.”
–Walter, when examining a Sanctum Waymark while the Ancient Archive is not powered
“I knew I forgot something.”
–Wanda, when examining a Sanctum Waymark while the Ancient Archive is not powered
“It's broken.”
–Wilson
“Who the heck broke this?”
–Willow
“Maybe we leave it like this.”
–Wolfgang
“Broken.”
–Wendy
“NONFUNCTIONAL”
–WX-78
“The device is in need of repair.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks pretty broken.”
–Woodie
“Obviously broken.”
–Maxwell
“Curses! 'Tis stricken!”
–Wigfrid
“Aw, it's broken!”
–Webber
“It is in need of repair.”
–Warly
“Broken?”
–Wormwood
“It's missin' a part.”
–Winona
“Don't despair, we can repair!”
–Wortox
“Not work. Glurgh.”
–Wurt
“We have to fix it first, Woby girl!”
–Walter
“It's plain to see it's broken.”
–Wanda
“Flashy transportation. Keep your gaze on the floor if you feel dizzy or disoriented.”
-
The Sanctum Waymark can be found inside the Sanctum. It is used to teleport to other parts of the Sanctum Maze. When there are more than 1 player in the Sanctum, everyone has to touch the Waymark before moving to the next room together.
The Sanctum Waymark from the lobby is activated by the Archive Switch, which is located inside the Ancient Archive.
After the Sanctum reset, any repaired Sanctum Waymarks become broken again.
Beneath the Sanctum Waymark there are marks that hint where a Waymark leads to:
North
East
South
West
Portation Orb[edit | edit source]
Portation Orb
Source
Sanctum
Miscellaneous
"vault_orb"
“I think this plays a roll.”
–Wilson
“What am I supposed to do with this stupid ball?”
–Willow
“It is not ball for fun.”
–Wolfgang
“It's quite pretty.”
–Wendy
“ESSENTIAL HARDWARE IDENTIFIED”
–WX-78
“This orb constitutes an essential component of a particle transfer apparatus.”
–Wickerbottom
“Wonder what it does.”
–Woodie
“It's part of a thing.”
–Maxwell
“What purpöse hath this blasted bauble?”
–Wigfrid
“Ooh, a ball!”
–Webber
“Is it a part of something?”
–Warly
“Who friend lose ball?”
–Wormwood
“Think I know where this goes.”
–Winona
“The ball took a fall!”
–Wortox
“Mine!”
–Wurt
“That's not your ball, silly girl!”
–Walter
“This is the functional piece.”
–Wanda
“A focus of intent for the Sanctum Waymark, drawing together those beyond.”
-
The Portation Orb can be found near the Broken Sanctum Waymark. Players can use it to repair the Broken Sanctum Waymark or craft Portation Orb Fragments.
Usage[edit | edit source]
×3
Gallery[edit | edit source]
The pattern under the Waymark hints where it points to.
Sanctum Teleport Concept from Rhymes with Play stream.
On Sanctum Concept from Rhymes with Play stream.
Sanctum Waymark Concept from Rhymes with Play stream.
Sanctum Waymark Effect Concept from Rhymes with Play stream.
Under construction
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Sanctum Waymark was introduced in the Ancient Echoes update.
